title: Anna #0451
definition:
Anna = "grace"

 1) A prophetess in Jerusalem at the time of the Lord's presentation
    in the Temple. She was of the tribe of Asher.
nasbUsage:
Definition: Anna = "grace"

 1) A prophetess in Jerusalem at the time of the Lord's presentation
    in the Temple. She was of the tribe of Asher.

    NASB:  Anna, a prophetess:
